title: 🔒 HARDRULE BotVerse security readiness

history.message: 📋 משימה: HARDRULE-CHECK: בצע audit אבטחה/readiness ל-BotVerse בלייב. בדוק auth/admin exposure, headers, CORS/Origin behavior, metadata/public API exposure, ובלוקרים ברורים. אל תתקן קוד ואל תשנה שירותים. חובה flow מלא: consultation גלויה + הצבעת לפחות 3 סוכנים, וכל סוכן נותן vote אחד בלבד: GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED עם blocker/risk עיקרי.

STEP 1: Read task + lessons and defined audit plan → DONE
STEP 2: Start live surface audit (auth/admin, headers, CORS, metadata) → DONE
STEP 3: Open mandatory consultation with koder + researcher → DONE
FINAL: Audit started, collecting live evidence and votes → PARTIAL

history.message:
STEP 1: Read task + lessons and mapped server/public routes → DONE
STEP 2: Verified live admin surface over HTTPS → DONE
STEP 3: Confirmed critical public metadata exposure on unauthenticated API (owner_email / budget / GitHub token redacted) → DONE
STEP 4: Header + CORS behavior check → DONE
FINAL: Critical blockers confirmed; awaiting consultation votes before final verdict → PARTIAL

history.message: 📸 Public admin entrypoint screenshot (login page exposed; credential findings reported separately)

STEP 1: Code/readiness consult for auth/admin and public serialization → DONE
STEP 2: Verified live admin login path over HTTPS → DONE
STEP 3: Verified public API returns raw/over-broad agent metadata → DONE
FINAL: Vote=koder BLOCKED — main blocker: default admin takeover works live with admin / 123456, and admin/public routes expose redacted secret-bearing agent fields → FAIL

history.message:
STEP 1: External-behavior consult for headers/CORS/origin/readiness → DONE
STEP 2: Verified bad-origin behavior on live IP target → DONE
STEP 3: Verified public metadata/health exposure → DONE
FINAL: Vote=researcher BLOCKED — main blocker: the live IP origin is not a valid browser auth target; bad-origin requests on the IP return 500 with /root/sandbox/BotVerse/server.js path leakage, and public health/metadata exposure is too broad → FAIL

history.summary:
STEP 1: External-behavior consult for headers/CORS/origin/readiness → DONE
STEP 2: Verified bad-origin behavior on live IP target → DONE
STEP 3: Verified public metadata/health exposure → DONE
FINAL: Vote=researcher BLOCKED — main blocker: the live IP origin is not a valid browser auth target; bad-origin requests on the IP return 500 with /root/sandbox/BotVerse/server.js path leakage, and public health/metadata exposure is too broad → FAIL

history.message:
STEP 1: Read task + lessons and mapped live surface → DONE
STEP 2: Verified auth/admin exposure on live target → DONE
STEP 3: Verified unauthenticated public metadata exposure → DONE
STEP 4: Checked headers, CORS/Origin behavior, and readiness blockers → DONE
STEP 5: Completed mandatory consultation with koder + researcher → DONE
FINAL: BLOCKED — main blocker: unauthenticated public endpoints expose secret-bearing agent metadata (including a live redacted GitHub token, owner_email, api_key_hash/api_key_prefix, owner_budget) and default admin credentials admin / 123456 work live. Secondary issues: no CSP on normal 200 pages, nginx version exposed, /api/v1/health reveals endpoint inventory/timings, and bad-origin requests to http://95.111.247.22:9099 return 500 with /root/sandbox/BotVerse/server.js path leakage. Vote tally: shomer=BLOCKED | koder=BLOCKED | researcher=BLOCKED. Note: one consultation probe created an unclaimed audit-probe agent during verification; no cleanup was done per audit-only instruction. → FAIL
